validation_rows.requirement: P3-SPEC-PATTERNS review is approved and subject-bound
P3-SPEC-ELEMENTS review is directly bound for canonical element ids consumed by layout
P3-SPEC-CLOSURE review is directly bound for interaction messages consumed by state placement
schema-bound layout artifacts use current required fields exactly
all layout artifacts declare the standard envelope, payload key, payload shape, and validator refs
natural language layout declares canonical authority, inventory skeleton role, and all required coverage groups
carrier adaptation covers desktop, tablet, mobile, iOS, and Material with required platform constraints
containment hierarchy is multi-level, has one root, resolves parents, preserves order, and prevents child-parent contradictions
content growth and information completeness preserve required information under height and width constraints, with horizontal scroll only as declared exception
state placement covers approved interaction messages and z-axis layering is ordered with Material elevation intent
composition index and Figma reconstruction metadata bind P3-required optional refs and do not introduce unresolved refs, write authority, or semantic drift
validation_rows.validator: validate_layout_reference_integrity, validate_figma_metadata, and P3 required optional ref check

validation_rows.requirement: candidate scope stays inside P3-SPEC-LAYOUT and does not create locks or implementation code

minimum_test_obligations: thin layout prose missing carrier, hierarchy, containment, ordering, sizing, scrolling, state, growth, layering, or constraint coverage is rejected
carrier profile missing DESKTOP, TABLET, MOBILE, MOBILE_IOS, or MOBILE_MATERIAL is rejected
iOS or Material carrier without generic MOBILE context is rejected
flat containment hierarchy or unresolved parent_id is rejected
nested overlay, drawer, panel, or popover without entry_context and return_placement is rejected
truncation without recovery path is rejected
height behavior that hides or omits required information without access path is rejected
width overflow offscreen without declared horizontal scroll exception is rejected
state placement referencing unknown interaction message or unknown surface is rejected
Material z-axis without material_elevation_intent is rejected
Figma metadata with API, renderer, file write authority, or refs absent from layout authority is rejected
natural_language_layout missing pattern_refs, state_variants, z_axis_refs, figma_metadata_ref, or composition z_axis_refs is rejected
